meta.title: Sage Studio · Hand-built websites for small businesses
meta.description: Hand-built, considered websites for small businesses. Personal, simple, made with care.
hero.label: Sage Studio · Prague
hero.sub: A small studio for small businesses. I design and build simple, considered websites — the kind that fit your work, not the other way around.
intro.label: Hi
intro.title: A small studio. One person. Real attention.
intro.text: I build websites the way good objects are made — slowly, with thought, and only what's needed. No templates rolled out from a factory, no agency layers between you and the work.
about_teaser.label: About
about_teaser.title: Hi, I'm Karolína.
about_teaser.p1: I'm a designer-developer with a real-world marketing background. I worked at Kofio running marketing, social-media content, ad campaigns, business analytics, team management and AI workflows — so I think about websites the way I'd think about any other piece of a small business: they should be simple, useful, and make sense.
about_teaser.p2: Sage Studio is the next chapter — a quiet space where I make websites for the kind of business you can call by name.
services.label: Services
services.title: What I can help you with
services.lead: Honest scope. I do these things, and I do them with care.
services.s1.title: Designing your website
services.s1.text: A look that fits your business — calm, considered, on brand. We sketch ideas together and refine until it feels right.
services.s2.title: Building it by hand
services.s2.text: Hand-coded HTML, CSS and JavaScript. No bloated platforms, no monthly subscriptions for things you don't need.
services.s3.title: Writing the words
services.s3.text: If you don't have time to write, I'll draft your home page in plain, warm language — drawing on my marketing background.
services.s4.title: Helping people find you
services.s4.text: Setting up your Google Map listing and basic on-page SEO so locals can find you when they search.
services.s5.title: EN + SK + CS toggle
services.s5.text: If your clients come from across the border, your website can speak their language. Like this one does.
services.s6.title: Small monthly check-ups
services.s6.text: If you'd like, I can keep an eye on the site each month — minor edits, fresh photos, small content updates. Optional.
portfolio.label: Work
portfolio.title: A few things I've made
portfolio.lead: Different industries, the same approach: hand-built, simple, considered.
portfolio.p1.title: Lumi
portfolio.p1.text: A warm, classic salon site — gallery, services, online booking.
portfolio.p2.title: Luna
portfolio.p2.text: For cafés that also live on Instagram — menu, hours, atmosphere.
portfolio.p3.title: Mend
portfolio.p3.text: A calm clinic site — conditions, therapies, therapist profile.
portfolio.p4.title: Rove
portfolio.p4.text: Editorial portfolio for a wedding / portrait photographer.
portfolio.p5.title: Stem
portfolio.p5.text: Boutique florist with seasonal collections and weddings.
portfolio.p6.title: Aria
portfolio.p6.text: A small movement studio — schedule, teachers, intro pass.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Discussed individually
pricing.lead: Every project is different. Some are a one-page site, some are a small shop, some need extra care. We'll talk through what you actually need and I'll send you a clear, fixed quote — no surprises.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: A few things you might be wondering
faq.q1: I already have a domain and an old website. Can you do something with that?
faq.a1: Yes. We can either move the domain to a new website or redesign on top of what you have — depends on the setup. We'll figure it out together on the first call.
faq.q2: What if I don't have any photos?
faq.a2: For the first version we can use beautiful free photos from Unsplash — the same kind you see across this website. Later, when you're ready, we replace them with your own.
faq.q3: Will I be able to make small edits myself?
faq.a3: For simple things like text, prices and photos — yes. I'll show you how. For bigger changes, just write to me.
faq.q4: Do you only work for the kinds of businesses shown here?
faq.a4: Not at all. The work above is just what I have ready to show. If you run a small business and you'd like a website, write to me and we'll see if it's a fit.
cta_band.title: If you're thinking about a website, write to me.
cta_band.text: No pressure, no commitment. Just a short conversation about what you'd like to make.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.text: Write to me about your business and what you'd like to make. I'll reply within a couple of days.
contact.form.name: Your name
contact.form.message: A few words about your project
footer.tagline: Hand-built websites for small businesses. Made with care, in Prague and Bratislava.
cookies.text: This site uses cookies to improve your experience.
